title: Influence of critical parameters of nanosuspension formulation on the permeability of a poorly soluble drug through the skin--a case study.

anchor_evidence.locator: Permeation Study using the Franz Diffusion cells
anchor_evidence.snippet: Permeation Study using the Franz Diffusion cells
The table shows drug content, flux, and cumulative amounts over time for various formulations.
Table I outlines the compositions of the ibuprofen nanosuspension formulations including concentration details.

notes: The paper outlines the impact of formulation variables on drug permeability, specifically using ibuprofen.
